zh.lifeSummary: 當Vincent Finch IV於1366年出生在英國英格蘭素可瑟費爾德時，他的父親Vincent Herbert Finch III22歲，母親Joan Passenden19歲。他於1397年與Isabella de Cralle在英國英格蘭素可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1441年在英國素可享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Vincent Finch IV于1366年出生在英国英格兰素可瑟費爾德时，他的父亲Vincent Herbert Finch III22岁，母亲Joan Passenden19岁。他于1397年与Isabella de Cralle在英国英格兰素可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1441年在英国素可享年75岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Finch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English finch, fink ‘finch’ (Old English finc), for a small, lively, cheerful person.

Americanized form (translation into English) of German, Jewish (Ashkenazic), Czech, Slovenian, and Croatian Fink ‘finch’, or of some of the corresponding Slavic surnames, e.g. Czech (Moravian) Pěnka (see Penka ).

variants.name: Fink
meanings: German, Jewish (Ashkenazic), Danish, and English: nickname for a lively and cheerful person, or, in the case of the Jewish name, an artificial name, from Middle High German vinke, Middle English and Yiddish fink ‘finch’ (see Finch and Vink ). The surname of German origin is also found in some central European countries, for example in Czechia, Slovenia, and Croatia, often as a translation into German of corresponding Slavic nicknames or surnames. In part, this is a Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) surname, originating from the Kočevsko region in Lower Carniola, Slovenia (see Kocevar ).

nameMeanings.name: Vincent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old French form of the Latin name Vincens ‘conquering’ (genitive Vincentis). This name was borne by various early saints particularly associated with France, most notably the 5th-century St Vincent of Lérins .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Vincent Finch IV was born in 1366, in Netherfield, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Vincent Herbert Finch III, was 22 and his mother, Joan Passenden, was 19. He married Isabella de Cralle in 1397, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1441, in Sussex, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Vincent Finch IV est né en 1366, à Netherfield, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Vincent Herbert Finch III, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Joan Passenden, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Isabella de Cralle en 1397, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1441, à Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Vincent Finch IV 1366 in Netherfield, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Vincent Herbert Finch III 22 und seine Mutter Joan Passenden 19. Er hat 1397 in Sussex, England, United Kingdom Isabella de Cralle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1441 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Sussex, England und wurde in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Vincent Finch IV è nato il nel 1366 nel Netherfield, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Vincent Herbert Finch III, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Joan Passenden, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Isabella de Cralle nel 1397, nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1441, nel Sussex, England, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Vincent Finch IVが1366年にイギリスイギリススセックスネスエルフィールドで生まれた時，父Vincent Herbert Finch IIIは22歳，母Joan Passendenは19歳であった。1397年にイギリスイギリススセックスでIsabella de Cralleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1441年にイギリススセックスで75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Vincent Finch IV(이)가 1366년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 네더필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Vincent Herbert Finch III(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Passenden(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1397년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 Isabella de Cralle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1441년 영국 수세스에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에 묻혔다.

pt.BET 10 JAN 1402 AND 9 JAN 1403: de 10 de janeiro de 1402 a 9 de janeiro de 1403
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Vincent Finch IV nasceu em 1366, em Netherfield, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Vincent Herbert Finch III, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Joan Passenden, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella de Cralle em 1397, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1441, em Sussex, Inglaterra, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Vincent Finch IV родился в 1366 г. в местности нетирфиелд, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Vincent Herbert Finch III было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Passenden, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella de Cralle в 1397 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1441 г. в местности суссекс, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Vincent Finch IV nació en 1366, en Netherfield, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Vincent Herbert Finch III, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Joan Passenden, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Isabella de Cralle en 1397, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1441, en Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
